---
name: Literature review task
about: Track a focused positioning or prior-art review item
title: "[literature] "
labels: [research, documentation]
assignees: []
---

## Review target

Name the family, paper, algorithm, or claim to review.

## Why it matters

Explain what wording, comparison, or novelty risk this review is meant to clarify.

## Questions to answer

- [ ] What is the closest overlap with AdicFlux?
- [ ] What is the strongest difference?
- [ ] Does this affect current README/docs wording?
- [ ] Should it be cited in `docs/positioning.md` later?

## Capture fields

- Citation:
- Family/category:
- Relevant theorem/result:
- Notes:

## Done when

- [ ] findings recorded in issue
- [ ] wording impact stated clearly
- [ ] follow-up doc change identified if needed
